title: aphragmus serpens
intro: Aphragmus serpens, also known as serpent's leaf or creeping cress, is a type of flowering plant in the mustard family that is native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Aphragmus serpens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Aphragmus serpens can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be consumed raw or added to salads, showcasing its versatility in herbal preparations.
